ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_number" TEXT /* Application number as submitted */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., MV, SA) */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the proposed project */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Scheduled hearing date for the application */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the application address */,
  "reference_file" TEXT /* Reference file number if applicable */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application */,
  "street_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the street (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Name of the street associated with the application */,
  "street_number" INTEGER /* Street number of the property */,
  "street_type" TEXT /* Type of street (e.g., Ave, Rd, St) */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X coordinate for geolocation */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y coordinate for geolocation */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the applicant (foreign key to `users` table) */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the project */,
  "planning_district" TEXT /* Planning district of the application */,
  "ward" TEXT /* City ward of the application */,
  "councilor" TEXT /* Councilor responsible for the area */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the application */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES application_statuses ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_application_type FOREIGN KEY ("application_type") REFERENCES application_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the application type (e.g., MV, SA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the application type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the application type */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the application type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the application status (e.g., Under Review, Closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the status */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hearing_dates" (
  "hearing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hearing */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application associated with the hearing */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Date of the scheduled hearing */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hearing */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes pertaining to the hearing */,
  "hearing_time" TEXT /* Time of the scheduled hearing */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the hearing */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the hearing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hearing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hearing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hearing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hearing_dates_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street_number" INTEGER /* Street number of the property */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Name of the street */,
  "street_type" TEXT /* Type of street (e.g., Ave, Rd) */,
  "street_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the street (e.g., N, S) */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the address */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference file */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related application */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the file */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reference_files_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., applicant, city staff, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's address (foreign key to `addresses` table) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., applicant, staff, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related application */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change or comment */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status at that time */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made about the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the history record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the history record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_history_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES application_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated application */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., drawing, report) */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the document */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_documents_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related application */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the notification */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)
